In 1973 Elsbett gained international recognition for the first ever serial- produced direct- injection diesel engine for cars. In 1977 Elsbett produced an engine fuelled by vegetable oil called the" Elsbett- motor". In 1980 Elsbett made the first conversion of standard diesel cars with prechamber engines to vegetable oil. In 1993 the" Elsbett Mercedes" won the first Eco Tour of Europe with the lowest consumption of fuel. In 1997 Elsbett won the European Solar Prize.
